# comfyui_polyexponential_scheduler (Resource)

ComfyUI PolyexponentialScheduler node [sampling/custom_sampling/schedulers]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rho` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 1
- `sigma_max` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 14.614642
- `sigma_min` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 0.0291675
- `steps` (Number) Input: INT default: 20

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `sigmas_output` (String) Output: SIGMAS (slot 0)
